purpose: Resolve the exact 2022 stress replay blocker with the smallest recoverable top-VIX-month block before considering broader calendar data.

execution_order: Acquire and validate real SPY 1-minute bars for the 13 cached October stress dates.
Run the October exact replay and trade-density checkpoint.
Only if the checkpoint passes, refresh the September option-quote estimate and acquire the bounded September block.

Q0_named_gap.gap: H-A2 exact stress-regime replay is blocked because 13 October 2022 option-quote dates lack real SPY underlying bars.

cached: October 2022 SPY 0DTE OPRA cbbo-1m option quotes
Q1_cache_first.missing: Real SPY 1-minute OHLCV bars for the 13 October stress dates

Q2_falsification_cost_guard.guard_formula: min(15 USD, 25% of remaining active guard room)

Q3_validation_smallest_missing_regime_bl.reason: October is already cached and supplies the missing stress regime. September remains contingent on the October trade-density checkpoint.

Q4_field_unlock.reason: Open interest is not a minimum required H-A2 field. This plan does not buy OI or claim a gamma result.

components.reason: The preregistered H-A2 geometry fields require underlying OHLCV, option bid/ask/size, forced-close quotes, and regime labels; OI is not required.

components.scope: 13 October 2022 stress dates, regular session OHLCV
components.subscription: NYSE American, BATS, ARCA, IEX and Regional Exchanges (Network B) L1, non-professional rate
components.hard_stop_before_action: Confirm the account is non-professional, the subscription is not already active, TWS/IB Gateway API is reachable, and historical bars are available. If the account quote exceeds 1.50 USD, stop and revise this plan.
Do not buy until the October exact replay passes the trade-density checkpoint; rerun live metadata cost, select and log one approved key env, and recheck per-key plus combined-pool headroom.

stop_if: Fewer than 2 dates produce an exact candidate-ready trade.
Underlying timestamp, coverage, or ORB reconstruction gates fail.
Implementable PnL cannot be computed separately from mid PnL.
Observed trade density makes the revised MinTRL projection worse enough that the September block cannot materially close the gap.
trade_density_checkpoint.post_stage_2_rule: After the two-month block, pause and apply the section 5 checkpoint. No remaining 2022 month may be purchased unless it adds a missing regime bucket and improves the MinTRL path.
